generic_rules: Focus repairs on resolving AGREE syntax errors before architectural changes.
Prioritize repairs that address unresolved identifiers or type mismatches.
Use only visible AADL features or locally declared helpers in AGREE expressions.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts reside within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Use `assume`, `guarantee`, `eq`, and `const` keywords for contract elements.
anti_patterns: Avoid adding architecture to fix AGREE errors; focus on expression or declaration corrections.
Do not introduce new identifiers without ensuring they are visible or properly declared.
Do not attempt to repair contracts with invalid syntax.
